## Description

Brief description of the changes made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue without changing functionality)
- [ ] New feature (adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality altered)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing Performed

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests run
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/research -v`
- [ ] Code coverage maintained/improved

## Testing Details

Describe what was tested and how.

```bash
# Commands used to test
pytest tests/test_feature.py -v
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guide (`black`, `ruff`, `mypy`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (docstrings, README, etc.)
- [ ] No breaking changes to public API
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Code coverage improved or maintained
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] No unrelated changes included

## Additional Notes

Any additional information for reviewers.

## Screenshots (if applicable)

For UI changes, include screenshots or GIFs.

---

**Instructions for Reviewers:**

- Review for code quality and style
- Verify test coverage
- Check for breaking changes
- Ensure documentation is clear
- Confirm no merge conflicts
